studio.instructors_only_body: This studio na for approved instructors and admins.
studio.admin_only_body: This side na for platform admins.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.heading: Keep di learning system healthy
admin.body: Check published content, drafts and platform readiness from one clear workspace.
admin.content_body: Admins fit manage every course, even published ones.
admin.guardrail_body: Use this side for platform oversight. Users, cohorts, revenue and analytics controls go land when their backend modules dey ready.
admin.portfolio_body: Courses, paths and cohorts for one place.

courses.title: My courses
courses.subtitle: Create, publish and maintain lessons wey help learners focus.
courses.heading: Build courses learners fit finish
courses.admin_heading: Manage every course for di platform
courses.admin_subtitle: Review, open, publish and delete instructor courses without leaving admin studio.
courses.empty: You never create any course yet.
courses.delete_description: This one go delete "{{title}}" forever, with all modules and lessons. Published courses fit delete too.

editor.no_modules: Add your first module make you start.
editor.builder_body: Arrange di course into short modules and make sure every lesson get content plus transcript.
editor.reason_video_not_encoded: Upload di video and let encoding finish.

lesson.title: Edit lesson
lesson.processing: E dey process — encoding for background
lesson.load_failed_body: Refresh di page or go back to di course and try again.
lesson.upload_queued: Upload don finish. Encoding don start.
lesson.audio_encoding_body: We dey balance di sound and prepare di protected audio file.
lesson.encoding_failed_body: Encoding fail. Replace di file try again.
lesson.transcript_hint: You need am before you fit publish (accessibility + search)
lesson.transcript_placeholder: Paste or type di full transcript…
lesson.drop_or_browse: Drag file come here, or browse
lesson.quiz_hint: Set how dis lesson go complete.
lesson.pre_quiz_hint: Optional recall check before the lesson.
lesson.post_quiz_hint: You must pass am to complete the lesson.
lesson.transcript_required_warn: Add transcript — you no fit publish the course until every lesson get one (§4.2).
lesson.free_preview_hint: Anybody fit watch/read dis lesson before dem enroll.
lesson.timed_hint: Paste or upload .vtt / .srt file make the transcript dey highlight as the lesson dey play. E no go change captions.
lesson.timed_parse_error: No timed segment dey. Paste correct .vtt or .srt transcript.

settings.title: Course settings
settings.subtitle: Thumbnail, description, price and Earn-Back wey people go see for catalogue.
settings.description_ph: Wetin learners go fit do after dis course?
settings.earnback_hint: Make learners fit earn part of di price back if dem finish on time.
settings.earnback_preview: Learners fit earn back {{pct}}% — {{amount}} out of {{price}}.
settings.estimated_duration_ph: like 6–8 weeks (your own pace or with facilitator)
settings.estimated_duration_hint: Estimate wey learners go see, like weeks. The content length dey calculate by itself from the lessons.
settings.content_length_hint: Dem calculate am from lesson video & audio.
settings.content_length_hint_path: Dem calculate am from the courses for dis path.
settings.featured_hint: E go show for the Featured carousel for homepage.
settings.request_featuring_hint: Ask admin make e feature dis for homepage.
settings.feature_requested_note: The instructor don request featuring — approve am for up.

paths.title: Learning Paths
paths.heading: Learning Paths
paths.subtitle: Join your courses into one ordered journey wey get im own price and Earn-Back.
paths.delete_description: “{{title}}” go comot. Im courses no go delete.
paths.empty: No path yet — create your first one.
paths.settings_subtitle: Thumbnail, outcome, price and Earn-Back wey people go see for catalogue.
paths.outcome_ph: By di end, learners go fit…
paths.earnback_hint: Di % govern di whole path purchase, e overshadow di courses inside.
paths.courses_subtitle: Order matter — learners dey move from top to bottom.
paths.draft_courses_note: Some courses still dey draft — publish dem make learners fit start.
paths.or_create_course: You no see am? Create new draft course:
paths.or_create_path: You no see am? Create new draft path:
paths.estimated_duration_ph: like 6–8 weeks (your own pace or with facilitator)

cohorts.title: Cohorts
cohorts.heading: Cohorts
cohorts.subtitle: Schedule guided run of courses with start date, seats, groups and assigned staff.
cohorts.empty: No cohort yet — schedule your first run.
cohorts.no_courses: No courses yet — add one below.
cohorts.paths_hint: Add whole paths join the standalone courses.
cohorts.no_paths: No path yet — add one below.

instructor.title: Instructor studio
instructor.body: Track your courses and paths, and jump back to dey build.
instructor.empty: Create your first course make you start.

blog.title: Blog
blog.heading: Blog
blog.subtitle: Write articles wey go show for di public blog — learning science, product news and more.
blog.empty: No post yet — write your first article.
blog.author: Author
blog.excerpt_ph: One or two sentence wey go show for card.

assessment.settings_subtitle: Pass mark, time, retakes and di integrity rules wey learner go take am under.
assessment.title: Title
assessment.ac_fullscreen_hint: E go auto-submit if dem comot plenty times.
assessment.ac_camera_hint: Face check every 30s — e dey run for browser.
assessment.questions_hint: Add questions by hand, or make AI draft am from lesson.
assessment.no_questions: No question dey yet. Add one or generate from lesson.
assessment.delete_desc: Dis go comot di assessment and all im questions.
assessment.ai_blurb: AI go draft questions from di lesson transcript. Check and edit am before learners go take di assessment.
assessment.ai_no_lessons: No source lesson dey for dis assessment. Add questions by hand instead.
assessment.ai_need_transcript: None of dis lessons get transcript yet — add one make you fit generate from am.
assessment.final_subtitle: Learner must pass dis one to finish di course and trigger Earn-Back.

take.reason_passed: You don already pass dis assessment.
take.reason_cooldown: Abeg wait small before you retake.
take.integrity_notice: Dem dey monitor dis assessment. Di timer dey run for server and dem go grade your answer automatically.
take.auto_submitted: dem submit am automatically (time don finish)
take.tab_warning: Dem dey record am as you comot for di page ({{count}}/{{limit}}).
take.tab_autosubmit: You don change tab too much — dem dey submit your attempt.
take.camera_denied: You must allow camera before you fit start dis assessment.

report.title: Integrity report
report.is_invalidated: Dem invalidate am — learner must retake
report.admin_clean: No flagged attempt dey for di platform.

project.delete_desc: Dis go comot di project and all di submissions.
project.title: Title
project.description_ph: Wetin learners suppose build and submit?
project.file_types: Type wey dem allow (use comma separate am)
project.peer_count: How many peer review per submission
project.no_rubric: No rubric yet — add criteria wey you go take grade (e optional).
project.section_subtitle: Things wey learners go submit and you go grade.

submit.rubric: How dem go take grade you
submit.pending: You don submit — dem never grade am.
submit.peer_cta: Do {{n}} peer review(s) make you fit finish dis project.

peer.intro: Review your peers' work well well. You must finish {{n}} make di project complete.
peer.none: No peer submission dey to review yet — check back soon.

play.auto_complete_done: You don complete am — well done!
play.read_to_complete: Read reach the end make you complete dis lesson.
play.completes_at: You go need to watch reach {{pct}}% before you fit complete am.
play.prequiz_body: Small recall quiz before you start.
play.on_to_next: Make we go the next lesson.
play.course_done_hint: You don reach the end of the course.
play.quiz_locked: Finish the lesson content first before dis quiz go open.

intro.title: Intro / preview
intro.subtitle: Optional video, audio, PDF or text wey learners go see before dem enroll — your own preview.
intro.needs_media: Add media for the editor make e complete

feature_requests.title: Feature requests
feature_requests.body: Instructors wey wan show for homepage carousel.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Na your public face for every course, path and cohort wey you create.
profile.name: Name
profile.photo_hint: Tap your photo to change or remove am. PNG, JPG or WebP, up to 5 MB.
profile.expertise_ph: Type a skill and press Enter, or pick from below…
